{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20653_1
|class_id=20653
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=collection@20653_2
|fame=13
|art=31
|fth=17
|civ=14
|tech=15
|ss1=Snail Leadership +2<br>prop@58573_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 3600/3600
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>prop@58573_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 3600/3600
|ss3=Snail Leadership +6<br>prop@58573_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 3600/3600
|ss4=Snail Leadership +6<br>prop@58573_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 3600/3600
|ss7=Snail Leadership +6<br>prop@58573_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 3600/3600<br> (Awakened)
}}
